original_abstract: Diffusional studies in deep eutectic solvent–water mixtures suggest that in many cases the fluids do not act as homogeneous mixtures and there is a complex behaviour between the cation, hydrogen bond donor and water.
humanized_abstract: Here, diffusional studies in DSS–water mixtures are performed to understand their dynamics and to deduce the possibility of homogeneous mixing. Results suggest that the DSS–water mixtures do not form homogeneous solutions. Complex interactions exist between the cation, hydrogen bond donor and water molecules.

document.output: Here, diffusional studies in DSS–water mixtures are performed to understand their dynamics and to deduce the possibility of homogeneous mixing. Results suggest that the DSS–water mixtures do not form homogeneous solutions. Complex interactions exist between the cation, hydrogen bond donor and water molecules.
document.input: Diffusional studies in deep eutectic solvent–water mixtures suggest that in many cases the fluids do not act as homogeneous mixtures and there is a complex behaviour between the cation, hydrogen bond donor and water.
